text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp. It's a
period of intense training where racers can
improve upon their practical skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Or... that's what it's supposed to be.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready, guinea pig? The number of
experiments that can only be done during the
summer rivals the number of stars in space!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Don't give in to the heat. I'll need you to be on
your best guinea pig behavior!
choice_data_list:
You know this summer camp is meant for you,
right?!

You know this summer camp is meant for you,
right?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A full-fledged adult shouldn't concern themselves
with such trifling matters. Come, let's enjoy
summer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Such was the calm before the inevitable storm
that would ensue during summer camp with Agnes
Tachyon!
